description: Production-time rule-adherence audit for an *existing* SKILL.md. Use ONLY when the user has a shipped skill and wants to know whether its rules actually land when Claude runs it. Outputs: failure classification by fix layer (skill text / rubric / brief / fixture) and targeted rule-text diffs.

results.query: Can you audit my pptx skill for rule adherence?
Does this skill actually work the way its description claims? I want a behavioral audit.
I need you to validate rule adherence in my docx skill — show me where the rules and behavior diverge.
Find what's broken in this skill — it's not triggering reliably and I don't know why.
Stress-test this SKILL.md and find gaps between what it says and how Claude actually behaves.
Review my skill end-to-end and tell me what's wrong with how it actually behaves vs the rules I wrote.
I want to optimize my skill's description for better triggering accuracy.
Help me create a new skill from scratch for PDF annotation.
Build me a skill that summarizes Slack threads.
Can you benchmark my skill and report variance across multiple runs?
Run an eval on my skill to measure trigger performance.
My skill isn't working right — can you help?
I want to improve my skill.
Make a new skill for processing CSV files into reports.
Check this SKILL.md.
Make my skill better at triggering.
Translate this UI string set to Thai.
Write a blog post about AI alignment trends.
Debug this Python traceback for me.
What's on my calendar today?
